items.final_wording: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30
source.population: Adults with type 2 diabetes; specific diagnostic exclusions are stated for children, pregnancy, and selected conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth type 2 diabetes review; partial because the baseline workflow has no explicit adult-only filter and is not limited to telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

items.rationale: The DHA section supports documenting a diabetes review that includes blood pressure, weight, cardiovascular-risk context, laboratory review, complications, medicine adherence, and agreed follow-up without generating treatment.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification
source.population: Adults receiving cardiovascular risk assessment or lipid-modification review for primary or secondary prevention.
source.setting: Primary care and other clinician-led cardiovascular prevention services.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult cardiovascular risk and lipid-modification assessment and monitoring; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.1.1–1.3.12 — cardiovascular risk and lifestyle review

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-led cardiovascular risk review and documented lifestyle discussion without autonomously generating advice.

items.rationale: The NICE section supports clinician-led cardiovascular-risk review and documented discussion without generating a score, medicine, or advice.
